_comment: Approximates the pre-strategic AI (before phase awareness, aux stack support, and spy denial). Used as the baseline for the cumulative-validation tournament. Cannot fully revert all changes via weights alone — the Outcast trashScore=-10 and the play-Outcast-first hand-ordering are hardcoded and remain active. So this baseline is 'pre-phase + pre-aux + pre-denial' but still includes the Outcast improvements.
